title: rubus × angustithyrsus
intro: Rubus × angustithyrsus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or thimbleberry, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Rubus × angustithyrsus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide relief from symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Rubus × angustithyrsus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or jam, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to support overall well-being and promote digestive health.
